name: Kahle Park
description: Kahle Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tomahawk, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Otts Park
description: Come play pickleball at Otts Park in Merrill, WI! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Ott's Park Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ott's Park Pickleball Courts in Merrill, WI! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: April 1 - November 1. . . depending on snow cover and conditions
hours: M-F: 8am - 4:30pm Site Map | Accessibility Statement © 2023 Merrill, WI Government Websites by Catalis | Privacy Policy

name: SARA Park
description: SARA Park is a place to play pickleball in Tomahawk, WI. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Tomahawk Middle School
description: Tomahawk Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tomahawk, WI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
